title: Beards
content:
There was an old man with a beard,
     Who said, "It is just as I feared! -
        Two owls and a hen,
        Four larks and a wren,
     Have all built their nests in my beard."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Beards", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
